elements.title: lang::report_page_097_title::local_kopere_bi
elements.commandsql:
SELECT kbi_m.id,
       kbi_uf.id                                         AS userid_from,
       kbi_uf.firstname                                  AS firstname_from,
       kbi_uf.lastname                                   AS lastname_from,
       kbi_uf.email                                      AS email_from,
       GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT kbi_rf.name SEPARATOR ', ') AS role_from,
       kbi_m.timecreated,
       kbi_ut.id                                         AS userid_to,
       kbi_ut.firstname                                  AS firstname_to,
       kbi_ut.lastname                                   AS lastname_to,
       kbi_ut.email                                      AS email_to,
       GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT kbi_rt.name SEPARATOR ', ') AS role_to
FROM mdl_messages kbi_m
       JOIN mdl_user kbi_uf ON kbi_uf.id = kbi_m.useridfrom
       JOIN mdl_message_conversation_members kbi_mcm ON kbi_mcm.conversationid = kbi_m.conversationid AND kbi_mcm.userid <> kbi_m.useridfrom
       JOIN mdl_user kbi_ut ON kbi_ut.id = kbi_mcm.userid
       JOIN mdl_context kbi_ctx ON kbi_ctx.contextlevel = 10
       LEFT JOIN mdl_role_assignments kbi_raf ON kbi_raf.contextid = kbi_ctx.id AND kbi_raf.userid = kbi_uf.id
       LEFT JOIN mdl_role kbi_rf ON kbi_rf.id = kbi_raf.roleid
       LEFT JOIN mdl_role_assignments kbi_rat ON kbi_rat.contextid = kbi_ctx.id AND kbi_rat.userid = kbi_ut.id
       LEFT JOIN mdl_role kbi_rt ON kbi_rt.id = kbi_rat.roleid
WHERE kbi_m.timecreated > 0
GROUP BY kbi_m.id, kbi_uf.id, kbi_ut.id
ORDER BY kbi_m.timecreated DESC, kbi_uf.lastname, kbi_ut.lastname
